html:
Exclusive to:  

The Brain Cloud Pill spawns in the Steamer Trunk.

It can be spawned into the game with the code "trinket_19".

×6

×8

×3

Trivia

  • Appeasing the Volcano with The Brain Cloud Pill may be a reference to the movie Joe Versus the Volcano, as Tom Hanks' character is claimed to have a fictitious terminal illness called a brain cloud by a corrupt doctor.

Miscellaneous
"trinket_19"
Exclusive to:
“Clouding of the brain... never heard of it...”
–Wilson
“Brain cloud? Sounds tragic.”
–Willow
“Wolfgang is not eat loose pills.”
–Wolfgang
“The owner's brain has surely clouded for good by now.”
–Wendy
“PROCESSOR STATUS REPORT... CLEAR SKIES”
–WX-78
“Curious...”
–Wickerbottom
“Who knows what this does?”
–Woodie
“Neither red nor blue.”
–Maxwell
“A medical experiment I'm reluctant to try.”
–Wagstaff
“It is always clear skies för a righteöus warriör.”
–Wigfrid
“What's a brain cloud?”
–Webber
“I only take herbals...”
–Walani
“An odd prescription.”
–Warly
“Fer brain storms.”
–Woodlegs
“WHATFORE IS'T WITHIN?”
–Wilba
“Hmm...”
–Wormwood
“Not my kind of adventure.”
–Wheeler
The Brain Cloud Pill spawns in the Steamer Trunk.
It can be spawned into the game with the code "trinket_19".

×8

Trivia[edit | edit source]
Appeasing the Volcano with The Brain Cloud Pill may be a reference to the movie Joe Versus the Volcano, as Tom Hanks' character is claimed to have a fictitious terminal illness called a brain cloud by a corrupt doctor.
